{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Leasing Executive (Land)",
  "description": "CW Real Estate is a forward-thinking real estate firm redefining the property experience across Nigeria and beyond. We specialize in premium residential and commercial properties, offering tailored solutions combining innovation, expertise, and an in-depth market understanding.

Driven by a passion for excellence, we provide end-to-end services&mdash;from property acquisition and development to sales, leasing, and property management. Our experienced professionals are committed to delivering value, integrity, and results for every client.&nbsp;At CW Real Estate, we don&rsquo;t just build and sell properties&mdash;we create communities, investments, and lifestyle opportunities that stand the test of time. Whether you&rsquo;re a first-time buyer, seasoned investor, or corporate partner, we&rsquo;re here to help you make smart, informed real estate decisions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Leasing Executive (Land)
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you a confident communicator and experienced closer with a passion for land sales and investment opportunities? We&rsquo;re expanding our Sales &amp; Leasing team and are seeking a dynamic and results-driven&nbsp;Sales &amp; Leasing Executive (Land)&nbsp;to join our reputable real estate firm.
	In this role, you will be responsible for driving the sales of land assets across our portfolio, connecting clients with high-value investment opportunities, and maximizing revenue generation.


Job Description
Sales &amp; Leasing Executive (Land):


	Profifcient in selling landed property
	Promote, market, and sell/leasingcommercial properties.
	Identify and qualify potential leads through networking, referrals, and market research.
	Conduct property viewings, inspections, and negotiations with prospective clients.
	Prepare and present property proposals,offers, and sales contracts.
	Ensure proper documentation of agreements and compliance with company policies.


Market Analysis &amp; Strategy:


	Stay updated on property market trends, pricing, competitor offerings, and investment
	opportunities.
	Provide strategic recommendations on pricing, marketing strategies, and property positioning to remain competitive.
	Analyze market data to identify new opportunities for occupancy and revenue growth.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a First Degree in Estate management or related field
	Minimum of 3 years&rsquo; experience in real estate sales or leasing
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Confident, self-motivated, and target-driven personality
	Good knowledge of Lagos Island property market (Ikoyi, Lekki, VI, etc.)
	Ability to manage relationships and deliver excellent customer service


Bonus Points for:


	Existing network of buyers, renters, or property owners
	CRM or digital sales tool experience
	Real estate certifications or ongoing training.


Compensation &amp; Perks


	N150,000 Monthly Stipend
	20% Commissionon all sales and rental deals closed
	Official Carfor client meetings and property tours
	Company Phonefor seamless communication
	Amazing Work Culture&mdash; collaborative, supportive, and growth-driven
	Access to a great teamand exciting real estate listings.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@cwlagos.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-15",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "CW Real Estate"
    
  },

Sales & Leasing Executive (Land) Job at CW Real Estate




        
    

        
        CW Real Estate is a forward-thinking real estate firm redefining the property experience across Nigeria and beyond. We specialize in premium residential and commercial properties, offering tailored solutions combining innovation, expertise, and an in-depth market understanding.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Driven by a passion for excellence, we provide end-to-end services—from property acquisition and development to sales, leasing, and property management. Our experienced professionals are committed to delivering value, integrity, and results for every client. At CW Real Estate, we don’t just build and sell properties—we create communities, investments, and lifestyle opportunities that stand the test of time. Whether you’re a first-time buyer, seasoned investor, or corporate partner, we’re here to help you make smart, informed real estate decisions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Leasing Executive (Land)
Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you a confident communicator and experienced closer with a passion for land sales and investment opportunities? We’re expanding our Sales & Leasing team and are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales & Leasing Executive (Land) to join our reputable real estate firm.
	In this role, you will be responsible for driving the sales of land assets across our portfolio, connecting clients with high-value investment opportunities, and maximizing revenue generation.


Job Description
Sales & Leasing Executive (Land):


	Profifcient in selling landed property
	Promote, market, and sell/leasingcommercial properties.
	Identify and qualify potential leads through networking, referrals, and market research.
	Conduct property viewings, inspections, and negotiations with prospective clients.
	Prepare and present property proposals,offers, and sales contracts.
	Ensure proper documentation of agreements and compliance with company policies.


Market Analysis & Strategy:


	Stay updated on property market trends, pricing, competitor offerings, and investment
	opportunities.
	Provide strategic recommendations on pricing, marketing strategies, and property positioning to remain competitive.
	Analyze market data to identify new opportunities for occupancy and revenue growth.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a First Degree in Estate management or related field
	Minimum of 3 years’ experience in real estate sales or leasing
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Confident, self-motivated, and target-driven personality
	Good knowledge of Lagos Island property market (Ikoyi, Lekki, VI, etc.)
	Ability to manage relationships and deliver excellent customer service


Bonus Points for:


	Existing network of buyers, renters, or property owners
	CRM or digital sales tool experience
	Real estate certifications or ongoing training.


Compensation & Perks


	N150,000 Monthly Stipend
	20% Commissionon all sales and rental deals closed
	Official Carfor client meetings and property tours
	Company Phonefor seamless communication
	Amazing Work Culture— collaborative, supportive, and growth-driven
	Access to a great teamand exciting real estate listings. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR/Admin Manager",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR/Admin Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR/Admin Manager will oversee all human resource and administrative functions, ensuring effective workforce management, policy implementation, and organizational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures
	Manage recruitment, onboarding, and employee lifecycle processes
	Handle employee relations, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution
	Design and implement performance management systems
	Drive employee engagement and retention initiatives
	Oversee payroll coordination and benefits administration
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labor laws
	Manage office administration, facilities, and support services
	Maintain accurate employee records and documentation


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	5&ndash;8 years of HR experience, with at least 2&ndash;3 years in a managerial role
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR best practices
	Professional HR certification (CIPM) is an advantage
	Strong leadership and interpersonal skills


Key Competencies:


	Leadership and people management
	Conflict resolution
	Policy implementation
	Organizational and administrative skills
	Communication and stakeholder management.


Salary
N400,000/month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@eandg.com.ng&nbsp;and&nbsp;eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

HR/Admin Manager Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR/Admin Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR/Admin Manager will oversee all human resource and administrative functions, ensuring effective workforce management, policy implementation, and organizational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures
	Manage recruitment, onboarding, and employee lifecycle processes
	Handle employee relations, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution
	Design and implement performance management systems
	Drive employee engagement and retention initiatives
	Oversee payroll coordination and benefits administration
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labor laws
	Manage office administration, facilities, and support services
	Maintain accurate employee records and documentation


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	5–8 years of HR experience, with at least 2–3 years in a managerial role
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR best practices
	Professional HR certification (CIPM) is an advantage
	Strong leadership and interpersonal skills


Key Competencies:


	Leadership and people management
	Conflict resolution
	Policy implementation
	Organizational and administrative skills
	Communication and stakeholder management.


Salary
N400,000/month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at Pixelpulse Viralchemy International Limited




        
    

        
        Pixelpulse Viralchemy International Limited is a company whose services range from recruitment to advertising, sales, branding & PR. We help businesses get qualified staff do they can focus on running their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Owutu-Asaga-Amangwu Road, Owutu Edda, Edda Local Government Area, Ebonyi
Employment Type: Full-time
Start Date:Immediate

Key Responsibilities

	Manage daily financial transactions and maintain accurate accounting records.
	Prepare financial reports, including profit & loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.
	Ensure accuracy and confidentiality of all financial information.
	Monitor and reconcile accounts, including bank statements and vendor invoices.
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes.
	Maintain compliance with relevant accounting standards and regulations.
	Collaborate with management to provide insights on financial performance and decision-making.


Qualifications & Skills


	HND or BSc in Accounting or a related field.
	Minimum of 1 year of experience as an accountant.
	Strong computer and digital proficiency (accounting software knowledge is a plus).
	Excellent attention to detail, accuracy, and confidentiality.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Additional Benefits:


	On-premises accommodation provided.
	Opportunity to contribute to a growing hospitality business


working Days:


	Working Days: Monday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Wednesday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Friday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Saturday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Off Days: Tuesday, Thursday, and Sunday (flexible if attention is needed, as accommodation is available on premises).


Salary
N80,000 – N100,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected]

Note: For more enquiries  WhatsApp; 09160773797
